message.content: {"items":[{"title":"ARD/ZDF Massenkommunikation Trends 2011: Teil 1: Mediennutzung","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA4528","justification":"National study on mass communication and media use in Germany, with a 2011 wave entirely within the 2010s and focused on media consumption patterns."},{"title":"ARD/ZDF-Langzeitstudie Massenkommunikation 2015: Teil 1: Mediennutzung","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA5987","justification":"German long-term mass communication study; the 2015 wave addresses media use and media structures in Germany during the mid‑2010s."},{"title":"ARD/ZDF-Langzeitstudie Massenkommunikation 2010: Teil 1: Mediennutzung","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA4527","justification":"German mass communication panel covering media use and media structures at the start of the 2010s."},{"title":"ARD/ZDF-Onlinestudie 2014","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA5966","justification":"Study of online and digital media use in Germany in 2014, including internet usage, online communication and media content."},{"title":"ARD/ZDF-Onlinestudie 2017","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA6808","justification":"Covers internet and online media usage in Germany in 2017, focusing on digital media penetration and patterns of use."},{"title":"ARD/ZDF-Onlinestudie 2019","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA7600","justification":"German online study focusing on internet, social media and online content usage towards the end of the 2010s."},{"title":"Medien und Kommunikationsverhalten in Deutschland 2016","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA6805","justification":"Survey on media and communication behavior in Germany, examining use of different media channels in 2016."},{"title":"Deutscher Bundestag – Medien in Deutschland (Bevölkerungsbefragung 2012)","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA5593","justification":"Representative population survey in Germany on attitudes towards media, trust in media and media use in 2012."},{"title":"Deutsches Longitudinalpanel zur Mediennutzung (2013-2018)","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA6800","justification":"Longitudinal panel on media use in Germany across much of the 2010s, covering multiple media types and platforms."},{"title":"Freiheit und Regulierung der Medien in Deutschland 2015","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA5989","justification":"Study on perceptions of media freedom, regulation and control in Germany in 2015, focusing on the media system and its evaluation."}]}
